final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the RAN QIU brand.

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 landscape minimalism, Kinfolk magazine natural-light editorial style, wabi-sabi material authenticity; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include generous negative space as a core design element
Subject: must include the RAN QIU brand mark/logo, natural elements (autumn leaves, branches, or organic forms)
Scene/backdrop: must be a warm autumn atmosphere with poetic, serene mood
Lighting/mood: needs golden hour lighting with shallow depth of field — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must use #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red) / #E8DCCB (beige) / #D4A574 (golden brown) as the core palette
Materials/textures: needs warm, natural material textures — exact tactile treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU" as the brand mark
Constraints: must preserve brand color values exactly, generous negative space required
Avoid:
